hOMESEEKERS' RATES

Went into Eject Yesterday and an
Unprecedented Rush Of Immi-


grants II Expected.

pages.raw_text:
The homeseekers' rates on the va
rious railroads went into effect yes
terday. According to advices receiv-
ed in local railroad offices an I'M
precedented rush of immigrants will
be made to this section this summer.
1t Is reported that several trainloads
of people have been gathered through
out the middle west who started as
soon as the rates went into effect.


The rates to prospective settlers
will be the same as last year. On
the Northern Pacific and Great North
ern the rate from st. Paul to Spokane
is $3.50 and 326 to the coast. From
Chicago the rate is IS more.


On the Burlington and Union Pa
cific the rate Is the same as the
above from Kansas City and Omaha.
From st. Louis the fare is $3.50
more. These immigrant rates will be
in effect until the last of April.
